visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: The fresh generated drawing still visibly differs from the same-name reference drawing in composition, annotation pattern, and sheet treatment.
visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: The generated view arrangement remains shifted and does not match the reference four-view distribution.
visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: Structured evidence still reports missing post-layout reference-intent targets and final DisplayDim below the reference floor.
visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Generated dimensions remain clustered around the primary and projected views, with several callouts difficult to read at the UI review scale.
visual_checklist_notes.title_block: The generated sheet still contains non-reference title/table treatment and does not match the compact reference treatment.
visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Manufacturing notes and reference-style blue technical annotations are not reproduced in the same layout or completeness.

visual_findings: The generated 006 output is fresh from run drw_output/runs/d2a1052532dd, but it is not visually acceptable.
The generated drawing still does not match the same-name reference layout and view distribution.
The generated drawing has different dimension grouping and remains hard to read as a manufacturing drawing.
The generated drawing remains below the reference DisplayDim floor and lacks proven post-layout target coverage.
Title block/template treatment and manufacturing notes remain visibly different from the reference.
entries.required_next_action: Revise 006 generation so post-layout reopen refreshes usable DrawingView objects, preserves reference-intent SolidWorks DisplayDim targets through final export, and matches the reference layout/title block/notes before another locked 006 CAD cycle.

acceptance_rule: A drawing is not accepted until the application Drawing Review UI screenshot is visually judged PASS against the same-name reference drawing with every required checklist item true.
